---
mode: agent
description: Create a new user story Markdown file using the BA template
---

Create a new user story file in `spec/03-user-stories/` following these steps:

1. Read `spec/_templates/user-story.md` for the template structure.
2. Read `spec/02-personas.md` and pick the persona that best matches the story I describe.
3. Read the most recent story files in `spec/03-user-stories/` to match the existing voice and Gherkin style.
4. Generate the next available story number (US-XXX) by scanning existing filenames.
5. Save the new file as `spec/03-user-stories/US-{number}-{kebab-title}.md`.
6. Show me the file in preview after creation.

Ask me for the story idea if I haven't provided one yet.
